basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology Shibpur (IIEST Shibpur) Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 07 July 2026 on the official website iiests.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Woman and Physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: First class M.E. / M.Tech /M.Sc in Electronics and Communication Engg or equivalent, NET/GATE qualified, Minimum 60% marks (General/OBC) or 55% (SC/ST/PH)
qualification.details: First class M.E. / M.Tech /M.Sc in Electronics and Communication Engg or equivalent degree from any recognized University or Institutes. Candidate must have qualified NET/GATE. At least 60% marks for General & OBC and 55% for SC/ST/PH category.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000/- for JRF and Rs. 42000/- for SRF + HRA (30%) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIEST Shibpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First class M.E. / M.Tech /M.Sc in Electronics and Communication Engg or equivalent degree from any recognized University or Institutes. Candidate must have qualified NET/GATE. At least 60% marks for General & OBC and 55% for SC/ST/PH category.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 33 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Woman and Physically handicapped candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37000/- for JRF and Rs. 42000/- for SRF + HRA (30%) Per Month

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) position at IIEST Shibpur is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class M.E./M.Tech/M.Sc in Electronics and Communication Engineering or an equivalent degree, and must have qualified NET/GATE. A minimum of 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/PH) is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF/SRF) position is 33 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF/SRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month for JRF and Rs. 42,000/- per month for SRF, plus 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with complete bio-data and attach all required documents, then send it to the official email address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIEST Shibpur offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Woman and Physically Handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is EC 1940.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
